email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Software Customer Success Consultant bij Page Personnel Belgium. Uw omschrijving sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel: ik combineer technische kennis van software-implementatie met een sterke focus op klantrelaties en kennisoverdracht.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto begeleid ik klanten bij de onboarding en optimalisatie van hun websites, geef ik opleidingen over SEO-tools en rapporteer ik over prestaties. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan in het beheren van een volledige klantportefeuille, van implementatie tot oplevering. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling (WordPress, AngularJS) stelt mij in staat om functionele oplossingen te bepalen en verbeteringen door te voeren.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel inzetbaar.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Software Customer Success Consultant position at Page Personnel Belgium. Your description matches my profile perfectly: I combine technical knowledge of software implementation with a strong focus on customer relationships and knowledge transfer.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I guide clients through onboarding and optimization of their websites, provide training on SEO tools, and report on performance. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience in managing a full client portfolio from implementation to delivery. My technical background in web development (WordPress, AngularJS) enables me to determine functional solutions and implement improvements.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible.

I look forward to discussing my motivation further in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Software Customer Success Consultant bij Page Personnel Belgium. Uw omschrijving sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel: ik combineer technische kennis van software-implementatie met een sterke focus op klantrelaties en kennisoverdracht.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto begeleid ik klanten bij de onboarding en optimalisatie van hun websites, geef ik opleidingen over SEO-tools en rapporteer ik over prestaties. Dit sluit direct aan bij de verantwoordelijkheden van onboarding, implementatie en het geven van opleidingen. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling (WordPress, AngularJS) stelt mij in staat om functionele oplossingen te bepalen en verbeteringen door te voeren. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig en proactief te werken, maar ook om in teamverband feedback te verzamelen en te verwerken.

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Software Customer Success Consultant position at Page Personnel Belgium. Your description matches my profile perfectly: I combine technical knowledge of software implementation with a strong focus on customer relationships and knowledge transfer.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I guide clients through onboarding and optimization of their websites, provide training on SEO tools, and report on performance. This directly aligns with the responsibilities of onboarding, implementation, and providing training. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience in managing a full client portfolio from implementation to delivery and detecting commercial opportunities.

My technical background in web development (WordPress, AngularJS) enables me to determine functional solutions and implement improvements. I am used to working independently and proactively, but also to gathering and processing feedback in a team.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible.

I look forward to discussing my motivation further in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok

cv_highlights:
• Klant onboarding en implementatie: begeleid klanten bij digitalisering en optimalisatie van websites (Episto, mirook.com)
• Opleiding en demo's: geef trainingen over SEO-tools en contentbeheer aan gebruikers
• Klantenportefeuille beheer: eigen project mirook.com volledig beheerd van implementatie tot oplevering
• Commerciële opportuniteiten detecteren: proactief verbeteringen en uitbreidingen voorgesteld aan klanten
• Technische achtergrond: WordPress, Elementor, AngularJS — functionele oplossingen bepalen en verbeteringen doorvoeren
tailored_cv:
# Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I guide clients through onboarding and implementation of websites, provide training on SEO tools, and manage ongoing client relationships. On my own project (mirook.com) I handled the full client portfolio from implementation to delivery, including detecting commercial opportunities and gathering feedback to improve the product. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

## Core skills
- Customer onboarding & implementation: guiding clients through digitalization, training users, managing client portfolios
- Training & demos: delivering product training, creating documentation, presenting to users
- Commercial opportunity detection: identifying upsell/cross-sell opportunities, gathering feedback for product improvement
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
